Repressions against residents of Kryvyi Rih, 1937–1938

City population at the time ≈ 197,000
With 1,878 documented cases of repressions, the true number is estimated to be at least 20% higher

Data source Melnyk, Oleksandr. 2017. Repressions of 1937–1938 in Kryvyi Rih. Kryvorizhzhia: A Look into the Past.
Visualisation Olena Tykhostup · github.com/Olena-Tykhostup/kryvyi-rih-repressions-1937-38
